name: Aerial Cleaner
short_description: Players take on the role of a high-rise cleaner. Equipped with a water jet gun, they clean dirt off various unique skyscrapers while swinging through the air using the recoil from the water jets. At the same time, players must fend off flying monsters to protect their lives.
detailed_description:
Game Overview

In this casual action-adventure game, players take on the role of a high-rise cleaner. Equipped with a water jet gun, they clean dirt off various unique skyscrapers while swinging through the air using the recoil from the water jets. At the same time, players must fend off flying monsters to protect their lives.

Game Features

Multi-Purpose Water Gun: The water jet gun serves multiple functions: it cleans dirt, propels the player by swinging from the recoil, and acts as a weapon against monsters.

High-Altitude Adventure: Scale skyscrapers with different themes, challenge your high-altitude cleaning skills, and experience the thrill of extreme cleaning missions.

Level Design: Explore diverse level designs, each with unique challenges and obstacles, testing players' reflexes and tactical skills.

Level Challenges: Completing each level's water and time limit challenges earns star rewards.

Contact
